subject: Religio Pro · {{paketCount}} paket alami penurunan traffic ≥ {{threshold}}%
body:
Halo tim Religio Pro,

{{paketCount}} paket mengalami penurunan jumlah visit kemarin sebesar ≥ {{threshold}}% dibanding rata-rata 7 hari sebelumnya (baseline minimum {{minBaseline}} visit/hari):

{{rowsBlock}}

Kemungkinan penyebab:
  - Ads campaign expired / paused
  - Landing page broken (cek /p/<slug>)
  - Kampanye organik turun signifikan
  - Kompetitor naik di SERP

Dashboard: {{adminLink}}

— sistem Religio Pro
